steps.title: Find the key phrase
steps.content: The phrase “an analysis of a corpus can support that hypothesis” shows the blank refers to something initially unproven that can be empirically validated.

steps.title: Choose the untested belief
steps.content: Supposition is an assumption or belief without proof. The other three mean summary, plan, and acknowledgment, none of which represent an untested idea. That matches choice D — D is correct.
